headline: 1 Healthcare Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Ignore
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 3.6% over the past six months, topping the S&P 500 by 2.3 percentage points.
